name: rag
description: Per-project RAG knowledge base with approval workflow. Index project files into a searchable knowledge base, approve what gets indexed, and query it semantically.

interface.longDescription: Index project files into a searchable knowledge base. Review and approve content before it becomes searchable. Knowledge is scoped per project and queried semantically.
defaultPrompt: Index this project for RAG search
Search the knowledge base for authentication logic
Show me pending knowledge to approve
